title: pultenaea sericea
intro: Pultenaea sericea, also known as the silky bush or silky pultenaea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a shrub that has silvery leaves and is native to Australia. Pultenaea sericea has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its health benefits.
